page: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, supported by 256.0 GB of RAM, which yields a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per vCPU. Additionally, the instance includes 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU, single-threaded gzip compression, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression all placing in the top 10%. Multi-core CPU performance, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and memory bandwidth (both read and write) fall into the average category. For lightweight LLM inference tasks using a small 135M model, the server demonstrates strong performance in both prompt processing and text generation, though performance drops to average for 7B models and poor for 70B models.

Given the high memory density of 16 GB per vCPU and the inclusion of a substantial 1890 GB local disk, this server offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive parallel compute scaling. The combination of top-tier single-core performance and large memory capacity makes it highly suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data analytics, and memory-bound enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine running on Microsoft Hyper-V, featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor operating at 4.5 GHz with 32 MB of L3 cache, this x86_64 server delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall into the average tier, while LLM inference speeds are strong for small models but drop for larger models. The instance includes 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per vCPU, it is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-core performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 16 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, offering top-tier single-core speed.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring top-tier single-core performance and substantial local storage for demanding database and analytical workloads.

256.0 GB of RAM providing a high 16 GB per vCPU ratio
1890 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
